Title: Valid CSV with all required fields uploads successfully
Precondition: Logged in as admin@ripplr.in on cdms-preprod.ripplr.in; valid MARCO_BrandReturn.csv with correct headers and data in all non-Ignore columns
Steps: 1. Navigate to Adapter Uploads 2. Click Upload > Upload CSV > document type Sales Return 3. Select FC=BGRD Brand=MRCO 4. Attach valid CSV 5. Submit 6. Filter results by FC/Brand/type 7. Wait for status
Expected Result: Row status is Fully Processed. No errors. brand_return and brand_return_detail records created in DB.

Title: Upload processes all Ignore fields without error
Precondition: Valid CSV where DistrBrName GodownName RouteName SalesmanName Brand Name PDA Batch Remarks OLD MRP LND Disc Add Tot Tax Perc are populated
Steps: 1. Upload CSV via Sales Return flow 2. Observe upload result and check DB
Expected Result: Upload succeeds. Ignore-flagged fields do not produce errors and are not persisted in DB.

Title: Missing SalesReturnDt field triggers field-missing error
Precondition: CSV with SalesReturnDt column header absent entirely
Steps: 1. Upload CSV missing the SalesReturnDt header
Expected Result: Error: "Expected SalesReturnDt field is missing in the uploaded file."

Title: Missing SalesReturnNo field triggers field-missing error
Precondition: CSV with SalesReturnNo column header absent entirely
Steps: 1. Upload CSV missing SalesReturnNo header
Expected Result: Error: "Expected SalesReturnNo field is missing in the uploaded file."

Title: Missing HSNCode field triggers field-missing error
Precondition: CSV with HSNCode column header absent entirely
Steps: 1. Upload CSV missing HSNCode header
Expected Result: Error: "Expected HSNCode field is missing in the uploaded file."

Title: Missing all lookup fields triggers errors
Precondition: CSV missing CustomerName, distrCustomerCode, ProductCode, ProductName headers
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with all four lookup-critical headers absent
Expected Result: One or more "Expected <Field Name> field is missing" errors raised for each missing field.

Title: SalesReturnDt in invalid date format triggers error
Precondition: Valid CSV where SalesReturnDt = "2026-03-15" (ISO) instead of expected format
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with SalesReturnDt in ISO format
Expected Result: Error indicating Company Invoice Date is not in the expected date format.

Title: SalesReturnNo exceeding 255 characters triggers length error
Precondition: CSV with a SalesReturnNo value of 256 characters
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with 256-character SalesReturnNo
Expected Result: Error: Company Invoice Number should not be more than 255 characters.
Notes: Confirm field name used in error message

Title: SalesReturnNo at exactly 255 characters is accepted
Precondition: CSV with a SalesReturnNo value of exactly 255 characters
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with 255-character SalesReturnNo
Expected Result: Upload succeeds; 255-character value stored in brand_return.Return_no.

Title: prodBatchCode with special characters triggers alphanumeric error
Precondition: CSV where prodBatchCode = "KI@0126#UU"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with special-character prodBatchCode
Expected Result: Error: Product Batch Code should be Alphanumeric no special characters allowed.

Title: prodBatchCode with hyphens triggers validation error
Precondition: CSV where prodBatchCode = "KI-0126-UU"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with hyphen in prodBatchCode
Expected Result: Error raised for special character in Product Batch Code.
Notes: BLOCKED - sample CSV data contains hyphens; spec vs. data contradiction must be resolved (EC-1)

Title: prodBatchCode exactly 55 characters is accepted
Precondition: CSV where prodBatchCode = 55 alphanumeric characters
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with 55-char prodBatchCode
Expected Result: Upload succeeds; batch code stored in ChampProductDetails.batch_no.

Title: prodBatchCode exceeding 55 characters triggers length error
Precondition: CSV where prodBatchCode = 56 alphanumeric characters
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with 56-char prodBatchCode
Expected Result: Error: Product Batch Code should not be more than 55 characters.

Title: prodBatchCode as null/empty is accepted
Precondition: CSV where prodBatchCode cell is empty for all rows
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with empty prodBatchCode
Expected Result: Upload succeeds; ChampProductDetails.batch_no stored as null. No error.

Title: Quantity fields as decimal triggers integer validation error
Precondition: CSV where Saleable Qty = "8.5"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with Saleable Qty = 8.5
Expected Result: Error: Invoice Qty should be an integer (no decimal).

Title: Quantity fields as valid integers are accepted
Precondition: CSV where Saleable Qty=8 UnSaleable Qty=480 FreeQty=0 TotalReturnQty=8
Steps: 1. Upload valid CSV with integer quantities
Expected Result: Values stored correctly in brand_return_detail good_qty bad_qty free_qty total_return_qty.

Title: NEW MRP as integer without decimal is rejected
Precondition: CSV where NEW MRP = "60" (no decimal)
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with NEW MRP = 60
Expected Result: Error indicating purchase_price should be a number with decimal (e.g. 60.00 required).
Notes: Confirm field name mapping - PRD says purchase_price maps to NEW MRP

Title: NEW MRP as valid float stored correctly in ChampProductDetails.mrp
Precondition: CSV where NEW MRP = "60.00"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with valid float NEW MRP 2. Query ChampProductDetails after upload
Expected Result: mrp stored as 60.0 (float). No validation error.

Title: Known CustomerName + distrCustomerCode maps to existing store_id
Precondition: Store with retailer code "9854WC0766" and name "Sri Balaji Provision Store" exists in Stores table
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with this CustomerName + distrCustomerCode combo 2. Query brand_return/Orders for store_id
Expected Result: Existing store_id is used; no new store record created.

Title: Unknown CustomerName + distrCustomerCode creates new store record
Precondition: No store exists for retailer code NEWCODE999 and name "Brand New Store"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with unknown CustomerName and distrCustomerCode 2. Query Stores table after upload
Expected Result: New store record created; new store_id mapped in Orders table. Upload does not fail.

Title: Known ProductCode + ProductName maps to existing product_id
Precondition: Product with code "731346" and name "PCNO H ED 20ML FT (576)-N" exists in Products table
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with this ProductCode + ProductName 2. Query brand_return_detail for product mapping
Expected Result: Existing product_id is used. No new product record created.

Title: Unknown ProductCode + ProductName creates new product record
Precondition: No product exists for code NEWPROD001 and name "Test New Product"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with new ProductCode + ProductName 2. Query Products table after upload
Expected Result: New product record created; new product_id mapped in OrderDetails.

Title: Valid Reg InvoiceNumber resolves to correct order_id
Precondition: Sales order with invoice number "ABEEK2592" exists for BGRD+MRCO in Orders table
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with Reg InvoiceNumber = ABEEK2592 2. Query brand_return for order_id
Expected Result: order_id matches Orders table row for fc_id=BGRD brand_id=MRCO invoice_number=ABEEK2592.

Title: Blank Reg InvoiceNumber stores order_id as NULL
Precondition: CSV where Reg InvoiceNumber cell is empty
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with blank Reg InvoiceNumber 2. Query brand_return for order_id of that row
Expected Result: order_id is NULL. Upload succeeds without error.

Title: Non-existent Reg InvoiceNumber behavior is defined
Precondition: CSV where Reg InvoiceNumber = "NONEXISTENT999" not in Orders table for BGRD+MRCO
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with unresolvable Reg InvoiceNumber 2. Check upload status and DB order_id
Expected Result: CLARIFICATION NEEDED - silent NULL or row-level warning/error?

Title: CGST+SGST > 0 path stores Gross Amount to 4 decimal places
Precondition: CSV row with CGST Perc=2.5 SGST Perc=2.5 IGST Perc=0 Gross Amount=436.4
Steps: 1. Run recalculateGrossAmount on CSV 2. Upload CSV 3. Query brand_return_detail.gross_amount
Expected Result: gross_amount = (436.4 / (1+5/100)) [per agreed formula] rounded to 4 decimal places.
Notes: Confirm canonical formula - PRD vs. code divergence (Risk 3)

Title: IGST > 0 path stores Gross Amount using IGST formula
Precondition: CSV row with CGST Perc=0 SGST Perc=0 IGST Perc=18 Gross Amount=118.00
Steps: 1. Prepare CSV with IGST-only row 2. Run recalculateGrossAmount 3. Upload and query DB
Expected Result: gross_amount = (118.00/(1+18/100)) [minus adjustments] to 4 decimal places. CGST/SGST path NOT applied.

Title: CGST+UTGST > 0 path stores Gross Amount using CGST+UTGST formula
Precondition: CSV row with CGST Perc=9 UTGST Perc=9 IGST Perc=0 Gross Amount=118.00
Steps: 1. Confirm UTGST column location 2. Prepare CSV 3. Run recalculateGrossAmount 4. Upload and query DB
Expected Result: gross_amount = (118.00/(1+18/100)) [minus adjustments] to 4 decimal places using CGST+UTGST.
Notes: BLOCKED - AQ-1 unresolved; CGST+UTGST path not implemented in dataUtils.js

Title: All tax percentages = 0: Gross Amount stored as-is
Precondition: CSV row with CGST Perc=0 SGST Perc=0 IGST Perc=0
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with all tax = 0 2. Query DB gross_amount
Expected Result: gross_amount in DB equals original CSV Gross Amount unchanged.

Title: Tax percentage fields empty: Gross Amount stored as-is
Precondition: CSV row where CGST Perc SGST Perc and IGST Perc cells are empty
Steps: 1. Upload CSV with empty tax percentage cells 2. Query DB gross_amount
Expected Result: gross_amount stored as raw Gross Amount from CSV. No crash or division-by-zero.

Title: Gross Amount stored to exactly 4 decimal places
Precondition: Valid CSV with CGST+SGST scenario producing many decimal places before rounding
Steps: 1. Upload and query brand_return_detail.gross_amount
Expected Result: Value stored with exactly 4 decimal places (e.g. 427.2510) not truncated.

Title: recalculateGrossAmount idempotency: running helper twice produces same output
Precondition: MARCO_BrandReturn.csv with .orig.json sidecar already present from prior run
Steps: 1. Run salesReturnBgrdMrcoWithIncrement twice in sequence 2. Compare Gross Amount after each run
Expected Result: Gross Amount values are identical after both runs. Sidecar prevents compounding recalculation.
Notes: Pure JS unit test - no Playwright needed; highest ROI

Title: Discount fields stored correctly in discount_info JSON
Precondition: CSV row with DB Disc=0 Cash Disc=0 Sch Disc=8.728 SM Discount=0
Steps: 1. Upload CSV 2. Query brand_return_detail.discount_info
Expected Result: JSON contains correct key-value pairs: special_DB Disc_amt special_Cash_amt special_Sch Discount_amt special_SM Discount_amt. Key names must match PRD exactly including spaces.
Notes: Space-containing JSON key names are high-risk

Title: Tax fields stored correctly in tax_info JSON
Precondition: CSV row with CGST Perc=2.5 CGSTAmt=10.18 SGST Perc=2.5 SGSTAmt=10.18 IGST Perc=0 IGSTAmt=0
Steps: 1. Upload CSV 2. Query brand_return_detail.tax_info
Expected Result: JSON: {"cgst%": 2.5 "cgst_amt": 10.18 "sgst%": 2.5 "sgst_amt": 10.18 "igst%": 0.0 "igst_amt": 0.0}

Title: Net Amount and Tax Amount stored as floats in correct DB columns
Precondition: CSV row with Net Amount=427.67 Tax Amount=20.37
Steps: 1. Upload CSV 2. Query brand_return_detail.net_amount and total_tax_amount
Expected Result: net_amount=427.67 total_tax_amount=20.37 as float values.

Title: Non-CSV file (.xlsx) is rejected
Precondition: Rename MARCO_BrandReturn.csv to .xlsx
Steps: 1. Attempt to upload .xlsx file via Sales Return flow
Expected Result: File rejected with format error. No DB records created.

Title: Empty CSV (headers only no data rows) handled gracefully
Precondition: CSV file with only the header row and no data rows
Steps: 1. Upload headers-only CSV
Expected Result: System shows meaningful error (No data rows found) or processes zero records gracefully. Does not crash.

Title: Completely empty file (0 bytes) is rejected
Precondition: An empty file named MARCO_BrandReturn.csv (0 bytes)
Steps: 1. Upload 0-byte file
Expected Result: Error returned; no processing attempt made.

Title: Duplicate file upload (same SalesReturnNo) is rejected or flagged
Precondition: Upload same CSV file twice without incrementing SalesReturnNo
Steps: 1. Upload MARCO_BrandReturn.csv 2. Upload identical file again
Expected Result: Second upload rejected as duplicate or shows error/partial status. No silent double-commit.
Notes: randomizeLastColumn must be bypassed for this test

Title: FC and Brand filter comboboxes require keyboard.type (not fill)
Precondition: Admin logged in on preprod; Sales Return upload modal open
Steps: 1. Click FC input 2. Use keyboard.type("bgrd") 3. Select from dropdown 4. Use keyboard.type("mrco") 5. Select from dropdown
Expected Result: Correct FC and Brand options surfaced and selectable. Direct fill without keyboard.type fails to trigger Ant Design dropdown.
Notes: Established automation pattern - must use keyboard.type

Title: Upload modal uses file chooser button not direct input injection
Precondition: Admin on preprod; Sales Return upload modal open with BGRD:MRCO selected
Steps: 1. Click "Upload a File" button 2. Observe file chooser dialog 3. Select CSV
Expected Result: File chooser dialog opens via button click. File attached and filename appears in modal.

Title: SalesReturnNo value stored in brand_return.Return_no
Precondition: CSV with SalesReturnNo = "AZSCDC85011"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV 2. Query brand_return.Return_no
Expected Result: Return_no = AZSCDC85011. Field persisted not discarded.

Precondition: Upload completed; brand_return record exists with Return_no value
Steps: 1. Navigate to Sales Return detail view 2. Observe Marico return number field
Expected Result: UI displays SalesReturnNo value under label "Marico return number".
Notes: BLOCKED pending AQ-8 - confirm UI change is in scope

Title: SalesReturnDt stored correctly in brand_return.return_date
Precondition: CSV with SalesReturnDt = "3/3/2026"
Steps: 1. Upload CSV 2. Query brand_return.return_date
Expected Result: return_date stored as 2026-03-03 (ISO). Date parsed correctly from M/D/YYYY.

Title: Existing BGRD:MRCO Sales Order upload not broken by return adapter changes
Precondition: bgrd-mrco sales order CSV exists in test-data/bgrd-mrco/
Steps: 1. Run bgrd-mrco Sales Order upload test 2. Check upload completes with Processed status
Expected Result: Sales Order upload continues to function. No regression from Return_no column or lookup changes.

Title: Auto Product Master fallback not triggered by Sales Return upload
Precondition: BGRD:MRCO Sales Return upload flow via salesReturnBgrdMrcoWithIncrement
Steps: 1. Confirm Sales Return upload path does NOT call scanForProductNotFoundErrors 2. Upload completes
Expected Result: No scanForProductNotFoundErrors call made. Product master auto-fix only on Sales Order uploads.
